_description: Classical music artist (solo pianist). Catalog consists of recordings of public-domain compositions — no original compositions to register. Writer and publisher are the original classical composers (Chopin, Debussy), not the artist. Publishing section intentionally reflects this unusual pattern: works exist in MLC/PRO context only as mechanical licenses, not original authorship. Tests publishing logic when the performing artist is not the writer.
_expectedBehavior: No publishing authorship on the performer — worksCount=0 from artist perspective. Catalog recordings present but publishing registrations won't map to this artist. Engine handles this gracefully. No identity issues.

recordings.title: Chopin: Nocturne Op.9 No.2 in E-flat major
Debussy: Clair de lune (Suite bergamasque, L. 75)
Schubert: Impromptu Op. 90, No. 2 in E-flat major
